params.swapCalls: Optional swap calls if tokens need to be converted back to USDC
params.vault: Vault address to get pool tokens from (required if swapCalls provided)

params.amount: Amount of USDC to deposit (6 decimals)

params.swapCalls: Array of swap calls to execute

params._controller: Controller address that can trigger swaps/deposits

returns._0: bool True if vault is calm

params.shares: Amount of vault shares to withdraw
params.swapCalls: Array of swap calls to convert tokens back to USDC

cancelDeposit(address,(address,bytes,uin.notice: User cancels deposit and gets USDC back (only if not in vault)

constructor.notice: Constructor sets immutable owner and factory

depositToVault(address,uint256,uint256,u.notice: Controller deposits tokens to vault when calm

executeSwaps((address,bytes,uint256)[]).notice: Controller executes 1inch swaps with API-provided calldata

getVaultShares(address).notice: Get vault shares balance for this wrapper

initialize(address).notice: Initialize controller (called by factory after deployment)

isVaultCalm(address).notice: Check if a vault is calm (ready for deposits)

withdraw(address,uint256,(address,bytes,.notice: User initiates withdrawal with controller-provided swap data
